name: socc-skills
description: Depth pack for the ACM Symposium on Cloud Computing (SoCC): the SIGMOD+SIGOPS systems-and-data intersection, the two-round annual deadline with rebuttal, dual-anonymous acmart submission, measurement and systems-building papers, cloud economics, and ACM artifact/reproducibility badging.

plugins.name: socc-skills
plugins.description: Twelve SoCC-specific skills for the ACM Symposium on Cloud Computing, the joint SIGMOD+SIGOPS cloud venue, grounded in the SoCC 2026 (Singapore) and SoCC 2025 calls, acmsocc.org, the ACM Digital Library, and dblp.
